div.head: 380. Telegram From the Consulate in Karachi to the Department of StateSource: National Archives, RG 59, Central Foreign Policy File, D790537–0262. Confidential; Flash.
div.p:
1. Our contact in Islamabad reports that group in Embassy vault area are becoming concerned about supply of oxygen in vault. Contact
reports British Ambassador has been in touch with President Zia and reports no rpt no concrete result.See Document 383.

2. If Department could establish contact with Zia either directly or indirectly through Embassy Washington, that might help to spur on what appears to our observers in Islamabad to be sluggish GOP response to Embassy take-over by mob. We are trying our best through our contacts but so far aside from report of helicopter on roof our efforts have not been crowned with success.
